name: sandeep-frontend
description: Sandeep's personal front-end and visual artifact design skill for light, polished, subject-specific interfaces, reports, slides, dashboards, and visualizations.

interface.shortDescription: Light, polished UI and artifact design
interface.longDescription: A personal front-end and visual artifact design skill for creating light-first, polished, subject-specific interfaces, HTML reports, slides, dashboards, visualizations, tools, and UI with compact hierarchy, useful controls, careful typography, strong copy, and non-generic design judgment.
defaultPrompt: Design this front end or visual artifact in Sandeep's style.
